subtitle: Senior Product & Platform Leader -- Data Platform | Multi-Stakeholder Migration | AI-Native Practice
summary_text: Senior product and platform leader with 8 years of multi-year platform roadmap ownership and 14 years owning the data function end-to-end at Money Management International -- a national 501(c)(3) nonprofit in the consumer credit space. Architected MMI's homegrown ERP/CRM evolution from single-product tool to variable multi-product platform, directing a 45-50 person delivery organization across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders. Owned the data function from DBA / SQL Architect origin through enterprise data warehouse maturation through production ML deployment via DataRobot in regulated credit services. Led full contact center platform transformation -- a complex multi-stakeholder migration affecting live customers -- with zero service disruption on day-one go-live. Currently consulting on AI architecture, automation, and implementation.

bullets: Designed an algorithmic AI architecture evaluation framework -- scoring rubric, capability taxonomy, evaluation flow -- adopted by a national CX consulting firm to compare enterprise AI platforms with explicit governance, integration-fit, and capability dimensions.

Provide client-facing advisory on generative and agentic AI architectures, automation, and implementation; translate executive priorities into architectural trade-offs and concrete platform decisions.
Hands-on AI-assisted engineering daily with Claude and GitHub Copilot; published thinking on AI adoption realities, the automation-vs-AI distinction, and practitioner workflow on LinkedIn.

Directed enterprise technology for a national 501(c)(3) nonprofit in the consumer credit space, under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators including the CFPB, with HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and CARD Act overlays.

Owned multi-year platform roadmap for MMI's homegrown ERP/CRM for 8 years, directing a 45-50 person delivery organization (BA, QA, software development) across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders; multi-factor prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x cross-departmental equity) governed sprint-over-sprint decisions.

Architected platform extensibility from single-product tool to variable multi-product platform -- each product carrying its own matrix of requirements, fees, and support; platform-product thinking applied to a regulated nonprofit context.

Owned the data function end-to-end for 14 years -- DBA / SQL Architect origin, enterprise data-warehouse maturation (reactive reporting -> proper DW -> self-service trajectory), and production ML deployment via DataRobot for credit and servicing use cases at scale.

Led full contact center platform transformation -- a complex multi-stakeholder migration program affecting live customers -- with intelligent routing, AI-assisted coaching and monitoring, integrated knowledge bots, and zero service disruption on day-one go-live.

Led cross-functional data-definitions discipline across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders -- agreement on metric calculations, definitions, and the cross-team incentive conflicts that surface around them.

Modernized SDLC through Agile transformation (SAFe 10-week to 2-week sprints); doubled development throughput; built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) technology team across onsite, offshore, and global vendor partners; sustained highest retention and satisfaction in the enterprise across 14 years.

Founded and ran a web development and IT consulting firm for 17 years -- full P&L ownership; delivered custom digital solutions for dozens of clients across content-driven and transactional verticals.
Architected and operated a proprietary commercial-grade CMS supporting dozens of production sites; direct client engagement across discovery, scope, architecture, build, and ongoing support.

projects.title: github.com/mknnmknn/about-mknn
projects.desc: Overview of public projects, with access to private repositories on request. Featured project: career-ops-dml -- a private fork of santifer/career-ops, customized into the LLM-assisted pipeline used daily in my job search. Working code extended alongside Claude Code (Node.js, Claude API, Playwright, Go).

DataRobot (Production ML), Data Warehousing, Data Pipelines, Data Governance, Power BI, Tableau
SQL / T-SQL, MSSQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL -- DBA / SQL Architect origin
Claude API, Generative AI, Agentic AI, AI Architecture Evaluation, LLM Platforms
Microsoft Azure, Azure DevOps, GitHub, CI/CD, Cloud Migration
PCI-DSS, HIPAA, CARD Act, Multi-State Regulatory, Agile/SAFe, SDLC Modernization, ePMO Governance
